permits.description: Remove & rebuid rear kitchen extension, including a new basement space underneath(to be used as mechanical room not living space). Remove and rebuild roof structure. Full gut of inside of the property to accomadate insulation and envelope upgrades. Replacement of exterior sheathing.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($484,356); keyword: gut; minor: insulation

llm_assessment.reasoning: The $484,356 full gut renovation with kitchen rebuild and roof replacement by an owner-occupant strongly suggests preparation for sale, as this level of investment typically coincides with a planned home purchase rather than long-term maintenance.
